Sage Bot Item Code: A340
Legend of Extermination

Triggers: Once in a while

Death in the Ice
The unit freezes 4 random enemy units for 5 sec. For the duration, the frozen units are unable to move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 5 sec.
Every 5 sec., the unit steals 25% of all stats from all frozen enemy units for 4 sec. Stacks up to 8 times. The unit also increases the incoming damage against them by 50% for 4 sec., and deals magic damage equal to 30% of the targets' health to them.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌚🌚🌚
